# maczo Originals — complete merchant integration reference (single file)

This one file contains everything needed to integrate maczo Originals as a seamless aggregator:
the onboarding steps, the wire contract (both call directions + HMAC signing + money model), and the
full OpenAPI specification of the seamless wallet you implement. Intended for one-shot reading by an AI.

Base URLs:  sandbox https://originals-api-dev.maczo.co  ·  production https://originals-api.maczo.co
Portal:     https://portal-dev.maczo.co (sandbox)  ·  https://portal.maczo.co (production)
Docs:       https://docs.maczo.co

================================================================================

# maczo Originals — Integration wire contract

The exact contract to integrate maczo Originals into your platform. You do two things: **call our launch
API** to open a game for a player, and **implement a seamless wallet** that we call to move money during
play. Everything is JSON, signed with HMAC-SHA256 headers, and uses integer minor units.

Machine-readable schema: the **API reference** on this site (Swagger UI). Interactive.

## 1. Roles & directions

- **maczo** = game provider. We run the provably-fair games + UI.
- **you (the operator)** = the source of truth for the player's balance. Our ledger is a display-only
  mirror; we never authorise a bet against a balance we computed — your wallet decides.

```
(1) LAUNCH + CATALOG      you  ──▶  maczo     open a game for a player · sync the game list · end a session
(2) SEAMLESS WALLET       maczo ──▶ you       debit the stake · credit the win · rollback · status · balance
```

## 2. Endpoints

**You call maczo** at your assigned base URL:

| Environment | Base URL |
|---|---|
| Sandbox (dev) | `https://originals-api-dev.maczo.co` |
| Production | `https://originals-api.maczo.co` |

| `POST {base}` | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/GameLogin` | Open a game session for a player; returns a playable URL |
| `/GetGameList` | Fetch the catalog of games you may offer |
| `/KickPlayer` | End a player's live session(s) |
| `/ReplayLogin` | Open a read-only replay of one settled round (support/disputes) |

**maczo calls you** at the wallet callback base URL you register (`{yourWalletBase}{prefix}`):

| `POST` | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/debit` | Place a bet (idempotent on `txn_ref`) |
| `/credit` | Settle a win (references the debit via `ref_txn_ref`) |
| `/rollback` | Reverse an applied debit |
| `/status` | Read-only: has a `txn_ref` applied? (unknown-result recovery) |
| `/balance` | Display-only balance for a player |

The full request/response schema for the wallet you implement is in the **API reference** on this site.

## 3. Authentication — HMAC-SHA256 headers

Both directions are signed the same way, with the shared secret you exchange with us (versioned by
`X-Key-Id`, so keys can be rotated with an overlap window):

- `X-Signature` — `HMAC_SHA256(secret, canonical)`, lowercase hex
- `X-Timestamp` — unix seconds; within ±60 s of now
- `X-Nonce` — single-use opaque value (reject a seen nonce)
- `X-Key-Id` — selects the signing key

`canonical` is the newline-joined string (no trailing newline):

```
METHOD
PATH
X-Timestamp
X-Nonce
sha256hex(rawBody)      # sha256 of the exact request body bytes; empty body -> sha256("")
```

Reject anything outside the window or with a replayed nonce (fail closed → `SIGNATURE_OR_CLOCK`).

## 4. Money model (non-negotiable)

- **HTTP status is always `200`.** Classify the outcome on the body `code`, never on the HTTP status.
- Amounts are **integer minor units** (`amount_minor`) + `currency` (ISO-4217) + `currency_exp`
  (minor-unit exponent). Never a float; full precision (e.g. 8-dp crypto) is supported.
- **Idempotency key = `txn_ref`.** A duplicate returns `code: DUPLICATE`, `duplicate: true`, and the
  **live** balance — it never re-moves money.
- A `credit` (win) or `rollback` MUST reference a prior applied debit via `ref_txn_ref`; a settle with no
  prior debit returns `code: TXN_NOT_FOUND` (never silent). A losing round is settled internally and does
  **not** call your wallet.
- `status(txn_ref)` is a **read-only** query — it must never move money.
- Unknown / unrecognised `code` ⇒ fail closed (treat as `BAD_REQUEST`).

**Result codes:** `OK`, `DUPLICATE`, `INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS`, `SESSION_INVALID`, `SESSION_REPLACED`,
`PLAYER_BLOCKED`, `ALREADY_SETTLED`, `IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT`, `TXN_NOT_FOUND`, `OPERATOR_TIMEOUT`,
`OPERATOR_UNAVAILABLE`, `RATE_LIMITED`, `BAD_REQUEST`, `OPERATOR_CONFIG_ERROR`, `SIGNATURE_OR_CLOCK`.

## 5. Ordering guarantee

Every bet follows a strict order so money is never at risk: validate the session → **debit your wallet
and confirm it applied** → draw the provably-fair outcome → commit the round → credit any win → reveal
the result to the player. A rejected or unfunded bet never draws an outcome, and a win is never shown for
an unfunded bet.

## 6. Provably fair

Every result is re-derivable from `(server_seed, client_seed, nonce)` via
`HMAC-SHA256(server_seed, "client_seed:nonce:cursor")`. The server-seed hash is committed before use and
revealed on rotation, so any player or you can independently verify any round.

## 7. Go-live checklist

1. We register your operator and issue your `operator_id` + a signing `key_id`; you send us your secret
   out-of-band.
2. Implement the five wallet endpoints (§2) and verify our signature (§3).
3. Set your wallet callback base URL + your inbound IP allowlist in the portal.
4. Test on the **sandbox** (`https://originals-api-dev.maczo.co`) end-to-end: launch → bet → settle →
   reveal, confirming your wallet honours idempotency, insufficient-funds, and `status`.
5. We approve go-live → your operator flips to active on production.

See **Onboarding** on this site for the step-by-step.

================================================================================

# Onboarding — sandbox → production

How to connect your platform to maczo Originals as a seamless aggregator. Full contract:
**Integration wire contract** on this site; interactive schema: the **API reference**.

## Endpoints

| Surface | Sandbox (dev) | Production |
|---|---|---|
| You → maczo (launch / catalog / kick) | `https://originals-api-dev.maczo.co` | `https://originals-api.maczo.co` |
| Merchant portal (your reports + settings) | `https://portal-dev.maczo.co` | `https://portal.maczo.co` |
| These docs | `https://docs.maczo.co` | `https://docs.maczo.co` |

## What you provide / what maczo provides

| maczo provides | you provide |
|---|---|
| `operator_id`, a signing `key_id`, the launch/catalog endpoints, the games catalog | Your **wallet callback base URL** (`{yourWalletBase}{prefix}`) that we call |
| The wire contract + interactive API reference + a sandbox to test against | Your **signing secret** (exchanged out-of-band, never on the wire) |
| Sandbox + a go-live approval | Your inbound **IP allowlist** (hosts that call our launch API) |

## Steps

1. **Register.** We onboard your operator and issue your `operator_id` + a signing `key_id`. You receive
   portal credentials.
2. **Implement the seamless wallet** — the five endpoints in the **Integration wire contract** §2,
   verifying our HMAC-SHA256 header signature (§3).
3. **Configure your side** in the portal: your wallet callback base URL + your inbound IP allowlist.
4. **Test on the sandbox** — point at `https://originals-api-dev.maczo.co` and run launch → bet → settle
   → reveal end-to-end. Confirm your wallet honours idempotency (`txn_ref`), insufficient-funds, and
   `status`.
5. **Go live.** We approve production; your operator flips to active and your callback host is enabled
   for production traffic.
6. **Reconcile.** Use the portal reports (GGR / turnover / RTP-actual / settlement) against your own
   ledger; commission statements are produced per your agreed basis.

## What you can rely on

- **You are the source of truth for money** — we never authorise a bet on a computed balance. Every
  money move is idempotent on a server-derived `txn_ref` (both sides dedupe).
- **Strict ordering** — the stake is confirmed applied before any outcome is drawn or revealed; a losing
  round never calls your wallet.
- Every outcome is **provably fair** and independently verifiable. Commission is a billing figure
  computed from aggregated totals — never deducted from a player's payout.

================================================================================

# OpenAPI specification — maczo-native-seamless.v1.yaml

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: maczo Originals — Seamless Wallet API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: >-
    The seamless wallet contract you (the operator) implement and maczo calls to move money during play.


    Direction: **maczo (provider) → you (operator)**. You hold the real player balance and are the source
    of truth; maczo's ledger is a display-only mirror.


    **Money-safety invariants (non-negotiable):**

    - HTTP status is ALWAYS `200`. Classify the outcome on the body `code`, never on the HTTP status.

    - All amounts are **integer minor units** (`amount_minor`) + `currency` (ISO-4217) + `currency_exp`
      (minor-unit exponent). Never a float; the merchant supports the full `currency_exp` (no 2dp cap).

    - Idempotency key = `txn_ref`. A duplicate returns `code: DUPLICATE`, `duplicate: true`, and the
      **LIVE** balance — it never re-moves money.

    - A `credit` (win) or `rollback` MUST reference a prior applied debit via `ref_txn_ref`; a settle
      with no prior debit returns `code: TXN_NOT_FOUND` (never silent).

    - `status` is a REAL read-only query of whether a `txn_ref` applied — it MUST NOT move money.

    - Unknown / unrecognised `code` ⇒ fail closed (treated as `BAD_REQUEST`, never blind-retried).


    **Authentication (header HMAC-SHA256).** Every request is signed with the per-merchant shared secret
    selected by `X-Key-Id` (so a key can be rotated with an overlap window). The signature is
    `HMAC_SHA256(secret, canonical)` where `canonical` is the newline-joined string:
    `METHOD` + `PATH` + `X-Timestamp` + `X-Nonce` + `sha256hex(rawBody)`. Headers: `X-Signature`
    (lowercase hex), `X-Timestamp` (unix seconds, within ±60 s), `X-Nonce` (single-use), `X-Key-Id`.
    Reject outside the window or on a seen nonce (fail closed → `SIGNATURE_OR_CLOCK`).
servers:
  - url: https://{merchantWalletHost}{pathPrefix}
    description: The merchant's seamless wallet base URL + path prefix (from the operators registry).
    variables:
      merchantWalletHost:
        default: wallet.example.com
      pathPrefix:
        default: /seamless
security:
  - nativeSignature: []
paths:
  /debit:
    post:
      summary: Debit (place a bet). Idempotent on txn_ref.
      operationId: debit
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigTimestamp"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigNonce"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigKeyId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/DebitRequest" }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Always 200; outcome is in the body.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/MoneyResponse" }
  /credit:
    post:
      summary: Credit (settle a win). Only called when payout_minor > 0. Requires ref_txn_ref.
      operationId: credit
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigTimestamp"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigNonce"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigKeyId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreditRequest" }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Always 200; outcome is in the body.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/MoneyResponse" }
  /rollback:
    post:
      summary: Rollback (reverse an applied debit). amount_minor MUST equal the original debit.
      operationId: rollback
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigTimestamp"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigNonce"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigKeyId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/RollbackRequest" }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Always 200; outcome is in the body.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/MoneyResponse" }
  /status:
    post:
      summary: Read-only probe of whether a txn_ref applied (unknown-result recovery). Moves no money.
      operationId: status
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigTimestamp"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigNonce"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigKeyId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/StatusRequest" }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Always 200.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/StatusResponse" }
  /balance:
    post:
      summary: Display-only balance for a player. Never used to authorize a bet.
      operationId: balance
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigTimestamp"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigNonce"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/SigKeyId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/BalanceRequest" }
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Always 200.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: "#/components/schemas/BalanceResponse" }
components:
  securitySchemes:
    nativeSignature:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Signature
      description: >-
        HMAC-SHA256 hex over METHOD+PATH+X-Timestamp+X-Nonce+sha256hex(body). Accompanied by the
        X-Timestamp, X-Nonce and X-Key-Id headers (see parameters).
  parameters:
    SigTimestamp:
      name: X-Timestamp
      in: header
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
      description: Unix seconds (integer string); within ±60 s of now.
    SigNonce:
      name: X-Nonce
      in: header
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
      description: Single-use opaque nonce.
    SigKeyId:
      name: X-Key-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
      description: Selects the per-merchant signing key (rotation).
  schemas:
    Money:
      type: object
      required: [operator_id, player_ref, txn_ref, currency, currency_exp]
      properties:
        operator_id: { type: string }
        player_ref: { type: string, description: Merchant's durable player identity. }
        txn_ref: { type: string, description: Idempotency key for this money move. }
        round_ref: { type: string }
        game_code: { type: string }
        currency: { type: string, example: USD }
        currency_exp: { type: integer, example: 2 }
        request_hash: { type: string }
        meta: { type: object, additionalProperties: true }
    DebitRequest:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        - type: object
          required: [amount_minor]
          properties:
            amount_minor: { type: integer, minimum: 1, description: "Integer minor units, greater than zero." }
    CreditRequest:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        - type: object
          required: [payout_minor, ref_txn_ref]
          properties:
            payout_minor: { type: integer, minimum: 0 }
            valid_bet_minor: { type: integer, minimum: 0, description: Turnover-eligible stake. }
            ref_txn_ref: { type: string, description: The prior applied debit's txn_ref. }
    RollbackRequest:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        - type: object
          required: [amount_minor, ref_txn_ref]
          properties:
            amount_minor: { type: integer, minimum: 1, description: MUST equal the original debit. }
            ref_txn_ref: { type: string }
    StatusRequest:
      type: object
      required: [operator_id, txn_ref]
      properties:
        operator_id: { type: string }
        txn_ref: { type: string }
    BalanceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [operator_id, player_ref, currency]
      properties:
        operator_id: { type: string }
        player_ref: { type: string }
        currency: { type: string }
    MoneyResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, code, currency, currency_exp]
      properties:
        status: { type: string, enum: [ok, error] }
        code:
          type: string
          description: Canonical WalletCode.
          enum: [OK, DUPLICATE, INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS, SESSION_INVALID, SESSION_REPLACED, PLAYER_BLOCKED,
                 ALREADY_SETTLED, IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT, TXN_NOT_FOUND, OPERATOR_TIMEOUT,
                 OPERATOR_UNAVAILABLE, RATE_LIMITED, BAD_REQUEST, OPERATOR_CONFIG_ERROR, SIGNATURE_OR_CLOCK]
        duplicate: { type: boolean, description: Idempotent replay — balance is the LIVE balance. }
        old_balance_minor: { type: integer }
        new_balance_minor: { type: integer }
        currency: { type: string }
        currency_exp: { type: integer }
        operator_ref: { type: string, description: "Merchant-side id, for the ledger join." }
        message: { type: string }
    StatusResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, applied, currency, currency_exp]
      properties:
        status: { type: string, enum: [ok, error] }
        code: { type: string }
        applied: { type: boolean, description: Whether this txn_ref is durably applied. }
        old_balance_minor: { type: integer, nullable: true }
        new_balance_minor: { type: integer, nullable: true }
        currency: { type: string }
        currency_exp: { type: integer }
    BalanceResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, balance_minor, currency, currency_exp]
      properties:
        status: { type: string, enum: [ok, error] }
        code: { type: string }
        balance_minor: { type: integer }
        currency: { type: string }
        currency_exp: { type: integer }
```
